basic_details.job_title: IISER Pune Post Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Science Education and Research (IISER) Pune
basic_details.short_information: The Indian Institute of Science Education and Research Pune (IISER Pune) has officially announced the Post-Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 with 01 opening. The detailed notification was published on 01 July 2026 at the official website (https://www.iiserpune.ac.in). Candidates who meet the age criteria of not more than 35 years and hold a Ph.D. in Humanities & Social Sciences, Science & Technology Studies, or related areas can now submit their online applications via email from 01 July 2026 to 10 July 2026. Direct links to download the notification and apply online are shared below.

important_dates.interview_date: To be notified on Institute Website

qualification.details: Minimum Educational Qualification: Ph.D. in Humanities & Social Sciences / Science & Technology Studies or related areas. | Preference: Candidates with expertise in Science & Technology Studies / Philosophy of Science / Sociology of Science / Anthropology will be preferred. | Age Limit (as on last date of application): Not more than 35 years. Age relaxation may be considered for candidates with higher qualifications/experience.

how_to_apply: Download the prescribed application format from the IISER Pune website.
Fill the form and convert it to PDF.
Send it via email to [email protected] on or before 10 July 2026.
Mention “Post-Doctoral Fellow and Advt. No. 46/2026” in the subject line.
Important Note: This is a purely temporary contractual position. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. The institute reserves all rights.

_labels.notification_pdf: Downlaod IISER Pune Post-Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Downlaod IISER Pune Post-Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IISER Pune Post-Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: Downlaod IISER Pune Post-Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IISER Pune Post-Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 Overview
IISER Pune Post-Doctoral Fellow Important Dates 2026

rows.event: Last Date for Submission of Application

rows.date: To be notified on Institute Website

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria for IISER Pune Post-Doctoral Fellow 2026
content_sections.text: Minimum Educational Qualification: Ph.D. in Humanities & Social Sciences / Science & Technology Studies or related areas. Preference: Candidates with expertise in Science & Technology Studies / Philosophy of Science / Sociology of Science / Anthropology will be preferred. Age Limit (as on last date of application): Not more than 35 years. Age relaxation may be considered for candidates with higher qualifications/experience.

content_sections.heading: Job Requirements
content_sections.text: The selected Post-Doctoral Fellow is expected to: Conduct research on a theme related to the area ‘Science and Society’ Publish a monograph based on the research conducted during the tenure Teach a course ‘Science and Society’ to the BS-MS students

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for IISER Pune Post-Doctoral Fellow 2026
content_sections.text: Download the prescribed application format from the IISER Pune website. Fill the form and convert it to PDF. Send it via email to [email protected] on or before 10 July 2026. Mention “Post-Doctoral Fellow and Advt. No. 46/2026” in the subject line. Important Note: This is a purely temporary contractual position. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. The institute reserves all rights. Official Website : https://www.iiserpune.ac.in

content_sections.heading: IISER Pune Post Doctoral Fellow Important Links
content_sections.text: Official Notification PDF: Click here Official Website: Click here Join Arattai Channel: Click Here Join Telegram Channel: Click Here Join WhatsApp Channel: Click Here Sarkari Result: Click Here Download Mobile App: Click Here

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IISER Pune Post-Doctoral Fellow 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to send the application via email is 10 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary for IISER Pune Post-Doctoral Fellow?
faq.answer: Consolidated emoluments are Rs. 67,000/- per month + 30% House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for IISER Pune PDF Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Only 01 (One) Post-Doctoral Fellow position is available under Advertisement No. 46/2026.

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum qualification required for IISER Pune Post-Doctoral Fellow?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a Ph.D. in Humanities & Social Sciences / Science & Technology Studies or related areas.

faq.question: Q5. Is prior teaching or research experience mandatory for IISER Pune PDF?
faq.answer: Expertise in Science & Technology Studies, Philosophy of Science, Sociology of Science or Anthropology is highly preferred.

faq.question: Q6. What is the tenure of appointment for IISER Pune Post-Doctoral Fellow?
faq.answer: Initially for one year, which may be extended or curtailed based on satisfactory performance.

faq.question: Q7. How to apply for IISER Pune Post-Doctoral Fellow 2026?
faq.answer: Interested candidates should send the prescribed application form (in PDF) to [email protected] with subject line “Post-Doctoral Fellow and Advt. No. 46/2026”.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent position at IISER Pune?
faq.answer: No, the position is purely temporary and contractual with no claim for permanent absorption.

faq.question: Q9. What is the age limit for IISER Pune Post-Doctoral Fellow Recruitment?
faq.answer: Maximum 35 years as on the last date of application. Relaxation may be given in deserving cases.

faq.question: Q10. Will there be an interview for IISER Pune PDF selection?
faq.answer: Yes, shortlisted candidates will be called for interview. Details will be published on the IISER Pune website.
